chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 68 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.739/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.740/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 16.08.2023 Mr. Abdul Fattah Samo, Advocate for applicants/accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Through instant bail application, applicants/accused Boohar S/o Buto alias Chutto, Muhammad Aslam alias Aslam S/o Boohar, Meer Ahmed alias Meer S/o Ghous Bux, Muhammad Iqbal alias Iqbal S/o Meer Ahmed alias Meero, Atta Muhammad S/o Abdullah Khan alias Faiz Muhammad, Abdul Qadir alias Ghulam Qadir S/o Faiz Muhammad, Abdul Haq S/o Niaz Muhammad alias Faiz Muhammad, Asghar Ali alias Asghar S/o Sain Dad, Dildar Ali alias Dildar S/o Sain Dad, Rafeeq Ahmed alias Rafeeq S/o Sain Dad, Muhammad Hussain alias Muhammad Hassan S/o Muhammad Ramzan, Noor Hassan S/o Muhammad Ramzan, Dil Murad S/o Bhai Khan, Abdul Ghafoor S/o Muhammad Pannah alias Pannah, Ghulam Sarwar alias Sarwar S/o Abdul Razaque, Jan Muhammad S/o Abdul Malik and Mazario alias Khan Muhammad S/o Chutto, all by caste Chachar, seek protective bail in Crime No.149 of 2023 of Police Station Ubauro, District Ghotki, registered for offences under Sections 337-A(i), 337-F(i), 506-II, 427, 147, 148, 149, P.P.C. and Section 7 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997. Through instant bail application, applicants/accused Boohar S/o Buto alias Chutto, Muhammad Aslam alias Aslam S/o Boohar, Meer Ahmed alias Meer S/o Ghous Bux, Muhammad Iqbal alias Iqbal S/o Meer Ahmed alias Meero, Atta Muhammad S/o Abdullah Khan alias Faiz Muhammad, Abdul Qadir alias Ghulam Qadir S/o Faiz Muhammad, Abdul Haq S/o Niaz Muhammad alias Faiz Muhammad, Asghar Ali alias Asghar S/o Sain Dad, Dildar Ali alias Dildar S/o Sain Dad, Rafeeq Ahmed alias Rafeeq S/o Sain Dad, Muhammad Hussain alias Muhammad Hassan S/o Muhammad Ramzan, Noor Hassan S/o Muhammad Ramzan, Dil Murad S/o Bhai Khan, Abdul Ghafoor S/o Muhammad Pannah alias Pannah, Ghulam Sarwar alias Sarwar S/o Abdul Razaque, Jan Muhammad S/o Abdul Malik and Mazario alias Khan Muhammad S/o Chutto, all by caste Chachar, seek protective bail in Crime No.149 of 2023 of Police Station Ubauro, District Ghotki, registered for offences under Sections 337-A(i), 337-F(i), 506-II, 427, 147, 148, 149, P.P.C. and Section 7 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997. Learned Counsel for the applicants/accused contends that the applicants are innocent, but they have been implicated in this case due to Cr. Bail App. No. D – 68 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 grudge of complainant on the issue of construction of shops at Dargah Peer Zurawar Shah, for which he was restrained by Dargah Committee. He further contends that the applicants/accused are ready to appear before the Court concerned along with an application under Section 498, Cr.P.C. to prove their innocence, however, they apprehend their immediate arrest as non-bailable warrants have been issued against them; hence, they seek protective bail. Without touching merits and de-merits of the case, protective bail for a period of eight days w.e.f. 16.08.2023 to 23.08.2023 (both days inclusive) is granted to the applicants/accused subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of non-bailable warrants in this case shall remain suspended during aforesaid period of eight days. Applicants/accused are directed to surrender before the Court concerned in the aforementioned period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above eight days period or whenever the applicants/accused surrender before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case the applicants/accused fail to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
